title: YPLUS Peanut Crayons for Toddlers, 12 Colors Non-Toxic Crayon for Kids Ages 2-4, Easy to Hold Washable Toddler Crayons, Coloring Art Supplies Toys
features: Non Toxic and Safety Crayons: YPLUS crayons is made by non-toxic natural synthetic wax. No paraffin or petroleum waxes and no cheap fillers. They are safe crayons for toddlers ages 1-3 and pre-school kids ages 2-4.

Bright & Vibrant Colors: You get 12 colors from the package which is enough for small toddlers to express what they imagine on paper, coloring book and art board. Ultra-Clean hand formula prevents residue on hands and parents never worry about the dirty little hands.
Easy to Grip: Toddler crayons have a Cute peanut-shaped design that can be grasped with the toddler ’s small hands so they could draw and paint with effortless.

Great Durability: Kids often drop crayons from the desk accidentally which may make crayons broken. Our crayons use new synthetic technology, which make the crayons hard to be broken and more durable to be used.

Top Gifts for Kids: This are first painting crayons for kids to develop creativity and imaginations, also can be used as building blocks to develop intelligence. Both parents and toddlers will love these peanut crayons, which are the perfect birthdays or holiday gift for children.
description: Product Description Bright and Vibrant Colors Vibrant Colors & Good Size Peanut Crayons are specially shaped designed for kids, toddlers' little hands could easily hold these painting crayons so they could draw and paint with effortless. And bright and colorful crayons provide long-lasting coloring Washable & Easy to Clean No more worry about messy of painting because of washable crayons. After painting, it's easy to wash off hands, faces, clothes or table with a wet rag. Holiday Gifts are Here When the holidays are coming, are you ready to choose gifts for kids? This peanut crayon set will win your kids’ heart, they are so happy to draw and paint with this crayons. Brand Essence Create unique, safe and high-quality products to accompany children to grow up. FILL THE WORLD WITH FINGER CRAYONS Level-up Child's Playtime Toddlers love to create wonderful scenes in their minds. All their strokes are what they want to express. Bright and colorful crayons provide long-lasting coloring Clean hand formula prevents residue on hands Cute peanut shape, easy to grip Help strengthen kids' fine motor skill Great durability, not easy to break Washable Non Toxic and Safety Crayons: YPLUS crayons is made by non-toxic natural synthetic wax. No paraffin or petroleum waxes and no cheap fillers. They are safe crayons for toddlers ages 1-3 and pre-school kids. Not Easy to Break Our crayons use new synthetic technology, which make the crayons hard to be broken and more durable to be used. Clean Hand Formula This wonderful formula of crayons keep hand away from dirty. No more worry about messy of painting.
